name: Low-Calorie Tomato Dressing
recipeInstructions: Calorie-counters who are hungry for flavor will find this a very satisfactory salad dressing. It is only 26 calories per tablespoon. First, blend mustard with water in a bowl and let stand for 5 minutes. Next, add tomato juice, oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper, green onion, and Worcestershire sauce to the mixture and beat well until combined. Finally, store the dressing in a covered jar and chill. Shake well before using. This recipe makes about 1 cup.
